issue.title: dit.whatsapp.net
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://dit.whatsapp.net](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fdit.whatsapp.net) ### Comment > WhatsApp messages get stuck. I can’t send or receive messages when protection is enabled. This effect is only on some messages and doesn’t effect every single message ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2tbofzoldi4g0gw4koccc4ow08csssomkstfdr5ms0.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/i0ckmrjsjsow0kg84ssgcog4o880sgw3t89f5sbyzm.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/pvx96zges1wk48w4kkcw440socgc888asa1fb5hxb4.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/6vttqn03k54w48w8c4c0wskgkwowkws6tp85ted408.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.15 System version: | `iOS 16.3` License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.adguard-dns.com/dns-query`
Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base,
AdGuard Mobile Ads,
EasyList

Privacy:
AdGuard Tracking Protection,
EasyPrivacy,
Peter Lowe's Blocklist

Social widgets:
AdGuard Social Media,
Fanboy's Social Blocking List

Annoyances:
